## Section 2 — Compliance Framing

Decree No. 47 (2019) establishes a suspension mechanism for non-compliant
institutions. The decree's effect is suspension pending remediation review.

## Section 3 — Institutional Response Patterns (revised, Round 2)

Institutions facing regulatory action under Decree No. 47 may face suspension
of accreditation status pending a remediation audit — not outright revocation.
